name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes –  3 Apr 2018
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Release Version","bold":true},{"text":": 6.14"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"We're excited to announce that Neto version 6.14 has begun rollout to all of our customer's sites. Some will already be on 6.14, others will be updated this week."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This release brings some new features to our eWay and eBay integrations, as well as the usual minor changes and bug fixes."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"We're planning a webinar to showcase the new eBay features, so stay tuned to for more details and to register your spot."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
